flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Shawnee Community College are 15% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($33.0k vs $38.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Shawnee Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.7k → $7.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Shawnee Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Shawnee Community College fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.5k → $1.7k).
